codeReview.summary: Feature requirements are satisfied by existing dashboard code: `ScoreBreakdownPopover` handles both missing `breakdown` and missing EV factor with explicit fallback UI, `App.tsx` composes search/status/insurer/FEMA filters with sorting and pagination (including page reset on filter change), and mobile navigation/layout keeps filter controls accessible. No regressions were found in the reviewed implementation for VAL-CROSS-002/003/004.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Verification-only features can end with a `commitId` that is not actually tied to the reviewed feature behavior, which weakens audit traceability.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `handoffs/2026-03-31T22-09-38-203Z__cross-area-dashboard-compat__c489d6ae-7873-4ecf-99d2-9c3a0b321a81.json` states "No code changes needed" for this feature, but references commit `11537a1`; `git show 11537a1` only adds `tests/test_cross_area_integration.py` for VAL-CROSS-001/006/007/008 (backend integration tests), not the dashboard compatibility checks in VAL-CROSS-002/003/004.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the assigned session transcript, handoff, and referenced commit diff, then verified the relevant dashboard code paths. The cross-area dashboard compatibility requirements are already implemented and no blocking or non-blocking code defects were identified for this feature.
